name: strada-website
description: Strada website and API. Auth, project management, query bridge to Tinybird/ClickHouse.

scripts.db:migrate:preview: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env preview
scripts.secrets: sigillo run --env preview --mount .env.preview --mount-format env -- wrangler secret bulk --env preview .env.preview && sigillo run --env prod --mount .env.prod --mount-format env -- wrangler secret bulk --env="" .env.prod
scripts.secrets:preview: doppler run -p website -c preview --mount .env.preview --mount-format env -- wrangler secret bulk --env preview .env.preview
scripts.secrets:prod: doppler run -p website -c production --mount .env.prod --mount-format env -- wrangler secret bulk --env="" .env.prod
scripts.deploy: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=preview doppler run -p website -c preview -- vite build && wrangler deploy --env preview
scripts.deploy:prod: doppler run -p website -c production -- vite build && wrangler deploy
